ValidationRule.description: Only SalesOps and SW Solutions can change the recipient field MIS-3015
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'SI_Product_Expert', ISCHANGED( Recipient_Picklist__c ), $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended', $Profile.Name <> 'SW Solutions' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only SalesOps or SW Solutions can edit Recipient for Sales Intelligence Deal Support
